water.name: Cedar Creek
aliases: Cedar Creek and tributaries upstream from Moon Lake access road

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(26) — Cedar Creek and tributaries upstream from Moon Lake access road
sources.quotedText: (26) Cedar Creek and tributaries upstream from Moon Lake access road (Lassen Co.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last Day in Feb. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a)(4) — General possession limit provision for listed trout waters
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

groups.humanSummary: Cedar Creek and tributaries upstream from the Moon Lake access road (Lassen Co.): open from the Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February, artificial lures only, 2-trout limit.
groups.verbatimText: (26) Cedar Creek and tributaries upstream from Moon Lake access road (Lassen Co.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last Day in Feb. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

parameters.note: Season runs from the Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last calendar day of the following February (Feb 28, or Feb 29 in leap years).

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last Day in Feb.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Possession limit equals the daily bag limit (1x) per the general provision at 14 CCR §7.50(a)(4): unless otherwise provided, no more than one daily bag limit may be possessed.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
